case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. LUIS A. SOLIS

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-09-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH
